title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery tutorial demonstrating how to build a Duolingo clone in React Native using a "Practical Vibe Coding" workflow with AI assistance. The tutorial covers setup, design, authentication via Clerk, state management, analytics with PostHog, real-time features via Stream, and Vision Agents for interactive AI features, claiming to reduce development time from months to a weekend.
